description:
Skills Marketplace Waitlist: https://brad-b.kit.com/f9a7349a1c

AI Strategy Call: https://cal.com/bradley-bonanno/ai-strategy-call
Connect with Me: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bradbonanno/

You're paying at least twenty bucks a month for Claude AI and you're probably using about two percent of what's actually in there. Most people open claude.ai, ask a question, close the tab. They never touch Skills, Connectors, Cowork, Routines, or any of the products that turn Claude from a chatbot into something that actually does work for you. That's the gap this video closes. If I had to start learning Claude from scratch today, this is the exact order I would learn it in.

In this Claude AI tutorial I walk through 13 products end to end. Claude Chat and artifacts. Connectors and MCP for plugging Gmail, Drive, Notion, Calendar and Slack into Claude. Projects for keeping work organised. Claude Desktop, Cowork and Live Artifacts for letting Claude read and edit your local files. Skills, the one feature that makes everything else dramatically better the moment you teach Claude how you actually want things done. Dispatch for handing tasks from your phone to your desktop. Claude in Word, PowerPoint and Excel. Claude in Chrome for browser automation. Claude Design for slides and visual work. Claude Code for the most powerful version of all of it. And finally Routines for putting recurring work on a schedule and taking it off your plate for good.

Whether you're new to Claude, comparing Claude vs ChatGPT, deciding between Claude Pro and Claude Max, or you've had a paid plan for months and never gone past the chat window, this is the map. Built for beginners, packed with the stuff power users miss.
